title: datura cornigera var. knightii
intro: Datura cornigera var. knightii, also known as the Knight's Thorn Apple, is a species of flowering plant within the Nightshade family, characterized by its unique appearance and toxic properties. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including antispasmodic, analgesic, and expectorant effects, which help to relieve muscle spasms, pain, and congestion. The health benefits of Datura cornigera var. knightii include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and provide relief from anxiety and insomnia. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made from the seeds, leaves, and roots, and can be found in various forms, such as teas, tinctures, and salves, although caution is advised due to its toxicity and potential side effects.
